creator: iwama@t3.rim.or.jp
text:
I applied "loader_main.diff" patch like r338201. Also, I made a disc1 disc image with "make release" and booted from this disc. As a result, I successfully booted from disc.

However, installing both zfsboot and zfsloader on V245 results in an error that kernel can not be read. The boot log is as follows:

===
{1} ok boot disk3
Boot device: /pci@1e,600000/pci@0/pci@a/pci@0/pci@8/scsi@1/disk@3,0  File and args: 
 
>> FreeBSD/sparc64 ZFS boot block
   Boot path:   /pci@1e,600000/pci@0/pci@a/pci@0/pci@8/scsi@1/disk@3,0:a
Consoles: Open Firmware console  
|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\
FreeBSD/sparc64 ZFS enabled bootstrap loader, Revision 1.0
(Thu Aug 23 19:15:53 JST 2018 root@v245.led.t3.rim.or.jp)
bootpath="/pci@1e,600000/pci@0/pci@a/pci@0/pci@8/scsi@1/disk@3,0:a"
|/-\|/-\
|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\can't load 'kernel'

Type '?' for a list of commands, 'help' for more detailed help.
OK 
===

The combination of zfsboot of 11.1-RELEASE and modified zfsloader successfully booted.
